channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Large tree by brook has many dead branches and over the weekend it made several noise's as if the branches were going to fall-Loud, 22nd June
item.description:
Along the brook out the back gate of 12 Pittmill Gardens Hucclecote GL3 3ND
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pitt Mill Gardens, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Ash Tree located on Highway land

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 22nd June
item.description:
Abrupt level difference FW 1100x200x20mm Standard TM with temp FW closure Stats (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 22nd June
item.description:
Give and take 28 day please lift and relay x4 rocking sunken tactile 400x400x18mm slabs temporary footway closure (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 22nd June
item.description:
Give and take 28 day please lift and relay x3 rocking sunken tactile 400x250x20mm slabs temporary footway closure (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 10 inch(approx) long pothole, 22nd June
item.description:
The road just off the garages nearest to number 19. It has been an issue for a long time and has deteriorated over the past 12 months. I have tripped on it several times, but Friday 19th June 2026, I fell and have a suspected Fractured left wrist, an injury to my right knee and a ruined pair of trousers.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Rushworth Close, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Holes in fence allowing access to private properties, 22nd June
item.description:
The fence in question sites adjacent to 103 Shurdington Road. It allows a child to fall in to the stream,

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 57, Leckhampton Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Half a metre in length pothole, 22nd June
item.description:
Near to the Burrows, see photos. Walk up this section of green street. on the left is the dreadful pothole. I fell so heavily that i was rolling around in the road in agony. I fell badly and twisted my ankle and knee, tore the skin off my knee and twisted my wrist and hurt my hand and suffered shock. I have bruising and swelling. I am putting in a claim. Please email me the details

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Street, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The whole road is full of stones left by cart clearing sides this morning, 22nd June
item.description:
Whole side road from Sir Thomas Riches school houses number 164 down and across road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor
